      _ = (2 * n - 1 : ℕ) % 2 := by simp
  have hodd : (2 * n - 1 : ℕ) % 2 = 1 := by omega
  have h4 : (4 : Fin 8).val = 4 := rfl
  have hsum : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8) : Fin 8) = 4 := by
    have := hp
    simp only [add_right_cancel_iff] at this
    exact this
  have : ((∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8) : Fin 8).val : ℤ) % 2 = 0 := by
    rw [hsum]; norm_num
  have hmod : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤˣ) : ℤ) % 2 = 
              ((∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8) : Fin 8).val : ℤ) % 2 := by
    simp only [Int.units_coe_coe]
    have : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤˣ) : ℤ) % 8 = 
           ((∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8) : Fin 8).val : ℤ) % 8 := by
      have := @ZMod.intCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd (∑ i, (p i : ℤˣ) : ℤ) 8
      simp only [Fin.sum_univ_eq_sum_range, Int.units_coe_coe] at *
      omega
    omega
  rw [hsum] at hmod
  simp at hmod
  omega

rw [ha_def]
  simp only [Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  intro ⟨p, hp⟩
  simp only [hE] at hp
  have h : ∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤˣ) = ∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ) := by
    simp only [Int.units_coe_eq_self]
  have hodd : Odd (2 * n - 1) := by omega
  have hsum_odd : Odd (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) := by
    have : ∀ i, p i = 1 ∨ p i = -1 := fun i => Int.units_eq_one_or (p i)
    have hvals : ∀ i, (p i : ℤ) = 1 ∨ (p i : ℤ) = -1 := fun i => by
      cases this i with
      | inl h => simp [h]
      | inr h => simp [h]
    rw [show (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) = 
        (Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = 1)).card - 
        (Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = -1)).card by
      simp_rw [← Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not Finset.univ (fun i => p i = 1)]
      have h1 : ∀ i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = 1), (p i : ℤ) = 1 := by
        intro i hi; simp at hi; simp [hi]
      have h2 : ∀ i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun i => ¬p i = 1), (p i : ℤ) = -1 := by
        intro i hi; simp at hi; exact (hvals i).resolve_left hi
      rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl h1, Finset.sum_congr rfl h2]
      simp only [Finset.sum_const, smul_eq_mul, mul_one, mul_neg_one]
      have : Finset.univ.filter (fun i => ¬p i = 1) = Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = -1) := by
        ext i; simp; exact (hvals i).symm.neg_resolve_right
      rw [this]; ring]
    have hcard : (Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = 1)).card + 
                 (Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = -1)).card = 2 * n - 1 := by
      have : Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = 1) ∪ Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = -1) = Finset.univ := by
        ext i; simp; exact hvals i
      have hdisj : Disjoint (Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = 1)) (Finset.univ.filter (fun i => p i = -1)) := by
        simp [Finset.disjoint_filter]; intro i _ h1 h2; simp_all
      rw [← Finset.card_union_of_disjoint hdisj, this]; simp
    omega
  have h4 : (4 : Fin 8) = ((4 : ℤ) : Fin 8) := by native_decide
  simp only [add_right_cancel_iff] at hp
  have : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8) : Fin 8) = ((∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) : Fin 8) := by
    simp only [Int.cast_sum]
    congr 1
    ext i
    simp
  rw [this, h4] at hp
  have hmod : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 8 = 4 := by
    have := congr_arg Fin.val hp
    simp at this
    exact this
  omega

rw [ha_def]
  rw [Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  constructor
  intro ⟨p, hp⟩
  simp only [hE] at hp
  have h : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8)) = 4 := by
    have := hp
    rw [add_comm] at this
    exact add_left_cancel this
  have sum_mod : ∀ i, (p i : Fin 8).val = if p i = 1 then 1 else 7 := by
    intro i
    fin_cases (p i) <;> simp [Int.units_eq_one_or]
  have key : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8).val) % 8 = 4 := by
    have := congrArg Fin.val h
    simpa using this
  have sum_parity : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8).val) % 2 = 
                    (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (1 : ℕ)) % 2 := by
    congr 1
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro i _
    have : p i = 1 ∨ p i = -1 := Int.units_eq_one_or (p i)
    rcases this with rfl | rfl <;> simp
  simp at sum_parity
  have odd_sum : (2 * n - 1) % 2 = 1 := by omega
  rw [odd_sum] at sum_parity
  have h4 : 4 % 2 = 0 := by norm_num
  have contra : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8).val) % 2 = 0 := by
    calc (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8).val) % 2 
        = ((∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8).val) % 8) % 2 := by omega
      _ = 4 % 2 := by rw [key]
      _ = 0 := by norm_num
  omega
